panels.title: Total answers
panels.description: Cumulative completed chat answers (chat_answer_count). Denominator for the non-downvote rate.

panels.title: Upvotes (total)
panels.description: Cumulative thumbs-up (chat_feedback_count, rating=up).

panels.title: Downvotes (total)
panels.description: Cumulative thumbs-down (chat_feedback_count, rating=down). Only these burn the non-downvote budget.

panels.title: No-vote (approx)
panels.description: Answers with no vote = chat_answer_count - chat_feedback_count. Counts as good.

panels.title: Non-downvote rate
panels.description: (answers - downvotes) / answers. Target 98%.

targets.expr: clamp_min(((sum(chat_answer_count) or vector(0)) - (sum(chat_feedback_count{chat_feedback_rating="down"}) or vector(0))) / clamp_min(sum(chat_answer_count), 1), 0)

panels.title: Vote mix over time (rate)
panels.description: Up/down vote rate plus approximate no-vote rate.
